case_title: THE CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO VS. JERAIL MCCOWAN

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $4,666.20 FILED BY THE CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO AS TO DEFENDANT MCCOWAN, JERAIL ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR DEC-01-2016 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF THE CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT MCCOWAN, JERAIL $4,666.20 PRINCIPAL, $45.50 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $4,711.70, (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT) STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
